content:
Introduction I&rsquo;ve had a number of different websites&mdash;handcoded (pre-CSS), self-hosted Movable Type and WordPress, hosted WordPress, idle play with Drupal, handcoded (with CSS) in a recent spate of nostalgia, etc.&mdash;and decided I&rsquo;d try a static site generator. It&rsquo;s been a while since I&rsquo;ve Learned A New Skill, and I guess I was in need of a new distraction/hyperfocus.
Well. &ldquo;Need&rdquo; is perhaps a strong word.
Especially since the impetus for a new website …
summary: Introduction I’ve had a number of different websites—handcoded (pre-CSS), self-hosted Movable Type and WordPress, hosted WordPress, idle play with Drupal, handcoded (with CSS) in a recent …
title: Adventures with Hugo

content:
Sometime in 2024, a person I follow on social media mentioned they were considering getting a ham radio license. This was a direct reaction to recent hurricanes, which had prompted this person to wonder what they could reasonably do in the event of natural disasters.
That got me thinking about the same thing, and I came to a similar conclusion. Lots of practical tasks are outside of my wheelhouse or beyond my capabilities. But running comms? I could learn that.
So I ordered The ARRL Ham Radio …
